base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pac_man_chomp_up — a character from 1980 pac man. closed-circle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame chomp cycle facing up — closed-circle → half-open (mouth pointing up) → full-open. Yellow palette
